description_long: This is a rectangular grave plot bordered by black stone or metal fencing, with a tiled red granite base. At the head of the grave stands a two-part monument: one side features a polished black headstone with an engraved portrait, Cyrillic inscriptions, and a floral motif, while the other side is a red granite slab with a white cross and a small white statue of a mourning figure on top. The grave is enclosed on three sides by the fence, leaving the front open for access. The surface is flat and paved with red granite tiles, providing a clean and formal appearance. The monument and fencing are robust and visually striking, with contrasting colors and materials. The overall design is solemn and respectful, suitable for a cemetery or memorial park.
description: A rectangular grave plot with red granite tiles, black fencing, and a two-part monument featuring a portrait headstone, a cross, and a white mourning statue.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black and red granite monument, white statue, and the fenced, tiled grave plot.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the engraved portrait, Cyrillic inscriptions, cross, and the open entrance to the grave plot.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the white statue atop the monument and the tiled surface within the fenced area.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the monument, the white statue, and the full extent of the black fencing.
attribute_tombstone_inscriptions: МЫСЛЯМИ, СЕРДЦЕМ И ДУШОЙ НАВСЕГДА С ВАМИ
